narrative:
Ronwen Williams is a goalkeeper for South Africa. His overall rating of 7.34/10 places him in the top 7% of goalkeepers at this tournament. This rating range is 6.92–7.76, reflecting the match sample size.

Williams averages 2.75 saves per 90 minutes at this World Cup, showcasing his shot-stopping ability. He also contributes with 1.25 clearances per 90 minutes. Notably, his 0.126 expected assists and 0.25 interceptions per 90 minutes highlight his unique involvement.

Williams plays a crucial role in South Africa's defensive structure, having played 360 minutes in this World Cup. While 88% of his rating comes from club form, his World Cup performances are growing. Scouts should watch for continued consistency in his shot-stopping and how his broader involvement impacts match outcomes.
